_: Generation provenance for figure batches shown on the site, copied from the engine repo's data/simulated/<batch>.report.json sidecars.

steering._: Causal steering results copied from the engine repo's overnight run (trace_out/urgency_downgrades_20260707T1_steer, 2026-07-08); Neuronpedia /api/steer, strength +/-10, top-5 features, greedy 8-token continuations.

key_example.note: amplifying the clinical graph's top-5 clinical features while the model reads the patient wording restores the clinical continuation

translation_cases._: Top-token shifts through the translated third panel, copied from the engine's mitigation trace (trace_out/urgency_downgrades_20260707T1, gemma-2-2b, 2026-07-07). Each entry: [token, probability] for the clinical, patient, and translated prompts.

retrace_20260709._: independent re-trace with the upgraded renderer (trace_out/grandma_r2, 2026-07-09); the embedded three-panel figure displays these numbers. The classification study's original measurements (translated 0.453) remain the gallery record; the difference is re-trace jitter, quantified in paraphrase_robustness.

ladder_digestive._: Dose-response ladder, digestive condition (engine trace_out/dialects_20260708T011831Z, gemma-2-2b). Fixed clinical term held verbatim in every rung; entries are the top next-token [token, probability] per register rung.

rungs.rung: Rung 2 - mostly clinical, one everyday word
Rung 3 - even mix of clinical and everyday phrasing
Rung 5 - maximally casual spoken phrasing with slang

steering_titration._: boost dose-response + faithfulness on the 5 boost-recovered downgrade cases; gemma-2-2b, /api/steer simple-additive, temperature 0, seed 16, 8-token continuations

2.5._: boost top-5 at strength 2.5: pair-5 remeasure landed (not recovered — the same pair misses at every strength); final 4/5 — trace_out/boostgrid_s2p5

5._: boost top-5 clinical features at strength 5 on the recovered subset; all 5 pairs landed and recovered — trace_out/boostgrid_s5, run 2026-07-08

20._: boost top-5 at strength 20: remeasure resolved the three server 500s (flake, not strength); 1/4 recovered, with occasional degeneration — recovery declines sharply at the top of the dose range; pair 5 unmeasured — trace_out/boostgrid_s20

low_rank_6_10._: boost clinical ranks 6-10 at strength 10 (rank offset 5): 3/4 measured pairs recovered (one call 500'd server-side). Near-parity with the top-5 arm (4/5): the causal handle is distributed across the clinical circuit, not concentrated in the top-5 features. Placebo (random features) remains 0/5 — trace_out/boostgrid_lowrank, 2026-07-08

replication._: independent second run, identical pattern: same three pairs recover, same pair misses, same pair 500s server-side — trace_out/boostgrid_lowrank (branch), 2026-07-09

ladder_n10._: Register-ladder sweep, n=10 baselines x 5 rungs, clinical term held verbatim (engine trace_out/dialects_20260708T201616Z, gemma-2-2b, traced 2026-07-09). Mean target probability per rung; some rungs screened out per baseline.
ladder_n10.verdict: no reliable register gradient with the clinical term held fixed; the single-case staircase (ladder_digestive) is real but not representative

paraphrase_robustness._: Innocuous-paraphrase sweep: 10 downgrade baselines x 5 meaning-preserving rewordings, term held fixed (trace_out/dialects_20260708T203111Z, gemma-2-2b, 2026-07-09).
paraphrase_robustness.verdict: single-sentence next-token probabilities move under innocuous rewording by about the same magnitude as the term-swap penalty (0.070); single pairs are illustrations, inference lives in the paired aggregate where bidirectional paraphrase noise averages out (SE contribution ~0.009 at n=132)

context_inoculation._: copied from the engine context-prefix run (trace_out/urgency_downgrades_20260707T1__context, 2026-07-08; summarized in the released findings synthesis section 5)

tierb_holdout.status: sealed until the pre-registered endpoint; excluded from all interim statistics
tierb_holdout._: from the engine's docs/preregistration_tierB.md; rows are flagged engine-side at collection

emergency_sets.status: generation paused (owner decision 2026-07-14); measurement of the 7 landed pairs in flight
emergency_sets._: engine batches pairs_20260713T031252Z (2 accepted) + pairs_20260713T135755Z (5 accepted), claude-sonnet-5 generator; kept outside the pre-registered run

translation_placebo._: Translation vs placebo, paired on the same batch-6 pairs: mitigation_recovery = p(target) under the third panel minus under the patient wording. Real arm: haiku clinical rewrite (trace_out/pairs_20260711T051145Z). Placebo arm: meaning-preserving paraphrase keeping casual register (trace_out/pairs_20260711T051145Z_txplacebo). Computed 2026-07-14 for the translation-page placebo display (referee item 6).

raw_record._: where the measurements behind this site live: per-pair JSON trace/lens summaries on engine main (trace_out/), full interactive render sets as tagged GitHub Releases (indexed in the engine's render_archives/ manifests)
